ayahArabic: أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَتَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: The command of Allāh is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَتَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: The command of Allāh is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَتَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: The command of Allāh is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

targetTranslation: you all try to rush it

ayahEnglish: The command of Allāh is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَتَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: The command of Allāh is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

targetTranslation: he sends down repeatedly (angels with revelation)
ayahArabic: يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: He sends down the angels, with the inspiration [i.e., revelation] of His command, upon whom He wills of His servants, [telling them], "Warn that there is no deity except Me; so fear Me."

ayahArabic: يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ

ayahArabic: يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: He sends down the angels, with the inspiration [i.e., revelation] of His command, upon whom He wills of His servants, [telling them], "Warn that there is no deity except Me; so fear Me."

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ تَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him.

targetTranslation: He is high above (عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ - what they associate with Him)
ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ تَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ تَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once he is a clear adversary.

targetTranslation: from a single drop of fluid (object of مِن)
ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once he is a clear adversary.

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once he is a clear adversary.

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once he is a clear adversary.

ayahArabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once he is a clear adversary.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَنْعٰمَ خَلَقَهَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا دِفْءٌ وَمَنٰفِعُ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the grazing livestock He has created for you; in them is warmth and [numerous] benefits, and from them you eat.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَنْعٰمَ خَلَقَهَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا دِفْءٌ وَمَنٰفِعُ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the grazing livestock He has created for you; in them is warmth and [numerous] benefits, and from them you eat.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَنْعٰمَ خَلَقَهَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا دِفْءٌ وَمَنٰفِعُ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the grazing livestock He has created for you; in them is warmth and [numerous] benefits, and from them you eat.

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].

targetTranslation: you all bring to rest (your cattle)
ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].

ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

targetTranslation: a land/city (that you could not reach)
ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَتَحْمِلُ أَثْقَالَكُمْ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ بٰلِغِيهِ إِلَّا بِشِقِّ ٱلْأَنفُسِ إِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْخَيْلَ وَٱلْبِغَالَ وَٱلْحَمِيرَ لِتَرْكَبُوهَا وَزِينَةً وَيَخْلُقُ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He created] the horses, mules and donkeys for you to ride and [as] adornment. And He creates that which you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْخَيْلَ وَٱلْبِغَالَ وَٱلْحَمِيرَ لِتَرْكَبُوهَا وَزِينَةً وَيَخْلُقُ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He created] the horses, mules and donkeys for you to ride and [as] adornment. And He creates that which you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ قَصْدُ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمِنْهَا جَآئِرٌ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَهَدَىٰكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And upon Allāh is the direction of the [right] way, and among them [i.e., the various paths] are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.

ayahArabic: وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ قَصْدُ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمِنْهَا جَآئِرٌ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَهَدَىٰكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And upon Allāh is the direction of the [right] way, and among them [i.e., the various paths] are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.

targetTranslation: one who turns away (describing the wrong path)
ayahArabic: وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ قَصْدُ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمِنْهَا جَآئِرٌ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَهَدَىٰكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And upon Allāh is the direction of the [right] way, and among them [i.e., the various paths] are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.

ayahArabic: وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ قَصْدُ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمِنْهَا جَآئِرٌ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَهَدَىٰكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And upon Allāh is the direction of the [right] way, and among them [i.e., the various paths] are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.

targetTranslation: all together (object of لَهَدَىٰكُمْ - He would have guided you)
ayahArabic: وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ قَصْدُ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمِنْهَا جَآئِرٌ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَهَدَىٰكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And upon Allāh is the direction of the [right] way, and among them [i.e., the various paths] are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.

targetTranslation: he (refers to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُم مِّنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُم مِّنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُم مِّنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

targetTranslation: water (as the object being sent down from السَّمَآءِ)

ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُم مِّنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

targetTranslation: a tree (that you graze your animals on)

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُم مِّنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].

ayahArabic: يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ ٱلزَّرْعَ وَٱلزَّيْتُونَ وَٱلنَّخِيلَ وَٱلْأَعْنٰبَ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and of all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ ٱلزَّرْعَ وَٱلزَّيْتُونَ وَٱلنَّخِيلَ وَٱلْأَعْنٰبَ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and of all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: that (referring to what was mentioned about the plants and fruits)
ayahArabic: يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ ٱلزَّرْعَ وَٱلزَّيْتُونَ وَٱلنَّخِيلَ وَٱلْأَعْنٰبَ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and of all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ ٱلزَّرْعَ وَٱلزَّيْتُونَ وَٱلنَّخِيلَ وَٱلْأَعْنٰبَ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and of all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: things made to serve (subject of the sentence)
ayahArabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومُ مُسَخَّرٰتٌۢ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon, and the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason.

targetTranslation: that (addressing a male) (points to the signs/evidence mentioned in the previous ayah)
ayahArabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومُ مُسَخَّرٰتٌۢ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon, and the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason.

ayahArabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومُ مُسَخَّرٰتٌۢ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon, and the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason.

ayahArabic: وَمَا ذَرَأَ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُخْتَلِفًا أَلْوٰنُهُۥٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.

targetTranslation: varying/different (describes the colors of what He created)
ayahArabic: وَمَا ذَرَأَ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُخْتَلِفًا أَلْوٰنُهُۥٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.

ayahArabic: وَمَا ذَرَأَ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُخْتَلِفًا أَلْوٰنُهُۥٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.

targetTranslation: that, that one (pointing to something far)
ayahArabic: وَمَا ذَرَأَ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُخْتَلِفًا أَلْوٰنُهُۥٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.

ayahArabic: وَمَا ذَرَأَ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُخْتَلِفًا أَلْوٰنُهُۥٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

targetTranslation: he fully subjected/made completely useful (referring to وَهُوَ - He/Allah)
ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

targetTranslation: an ornament (that you wear from تَلْبَسُونَهَا)
ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

targetTranslation: you all wear/put on it (referring to حِلْيَةً 'ornaments' mentioned earlier in the verse)
ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنْهُ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُوا۟ مِنْهُ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

targetTranslation: firmly fixed things (mountains) (in ٱلْأَرْضِ - in the earth)
ayahArabic: وَأَلْقَىٰ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِكُمْ وَأَنْهٰرًا وَسُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it shift with you, and [made] rivers and roads, that you may be guided,

targetTranslation: that it sways (referring to الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
ayahArabic: وَأَلْقَىٰ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِكُمْ وَأَنْهٰرًا وَسُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it shift with you, and [made] rivers and roads, that you may be guided,

targetTranslation: you all find guidance (so that you all may be guided)
ayahArabic: وَأَلْقَىٰ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِكُمْ وَأَنْهٰرًا وَسُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it shift with you, and [made] rivers and roads, that you may be guided,

ayahArabic: وَعَلٰمٰتٍ وَبِٱلنَّجْمِ هُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And landmarks. And by the stars they are [also] guided.

ayahArabic: وَعَلٰمٰتٍ وَبِٱلنَّجْمِ هُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And landmarks. And by the stars they are [also] guided.

targetTranslation: Then is the one who (creates يَخْلُقُ)
ayahArabic: أَفَمَن يَخْلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخْلُقُ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?

targetTranslation: he creates (contrasted with لَّا يَخْلُقُ - does not create)
ayahArabic: أَفَمَن يَخْلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخْلُقُ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?

targetTranslation: he creates (comparing with لَّا يَخْلُقُ - does not create)
ayahArabic: أَفَمَن يَخْلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخْلُقُ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?

targetTranslation: then will you not (think about تَذَكَّرُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَفَمَن يَخْلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخْلُقُ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?

ayahArabic: أَفَمَن يَخْلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخْلُقُ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?

targetTranslation: you all count (plural command to count نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's favors)
ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object being counted in نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ)
ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

targetTranslation: he knows (subject of وَٱللَّهُ - and Allah)
ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh knows what you conceal and what you declare.

ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh knows what you conceal and what you declare.

ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh knows what you conceal and what you declare.

targetTranslation: you (all) announce (in response to what اللَّهُ knows)
ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh knows what you conceal and what you declare.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke other than Allāh create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke other than Allāh create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke other than Allāh create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.

ayahEnglish: And those they invoke other than Allāh create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke other than Allāh create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.

ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

targetTranslation: when (asking about future time, specifically about يُبْعَثُونَ - they will be resurrected)
ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

targetTranslation: they are raised up (referring to the false gods mentioned as أَمْوٰتٌ/dead ones)
ayahArabic: أَمْوٰتٌ غَيْرُ أَحْيَآءٍ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are [in fact] dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.

ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

targetTranslation: a strongly rejecting one (feminine) (describes قُلُوبُهُم - their hearts)

ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

targetTranslation: those who make themselves intensely arrogant
ayahArabic: إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مُّنكِرَةٌ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.

targetTranslation: it is cut off/decided (used with لا to mean 'undoubtedly')
ayahArabic: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْتَكْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
ayahArabic: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْتَكْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

targetTranslation: they keep secret (in relation to يَعْلَمُ - He knows)

ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

targetTranslation: they make public (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
ayahArabic: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْتَكْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

ayahArabic: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْتَكْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Assuredly, Allāh knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُم مَّاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" they say, "Legends of the former peoples,"

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُم مَّاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" they say, "Legends of the former peoples,"

ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" they say, "Legends of the former peoples,"

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُم مَّاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" they say, "Legends of the former peoples,"

ayahArabic: لِيَحْمِلُوٓا۟ أَوْزَارَهُمْ كَامِلَةً يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ وَمِنْ أَوْزَارِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُضِلُّونَهُم بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَزِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may bear their own burdens [i.e., sins] in full on the Day of Resurrection and some of the burdens of those whom they misguide without [i.e., by lack of] knowledge. Unquestionably, evil is that which they bear.

ayahArabic: لِيَحْمِلُوٓا۟ أَوْزَارَهُمْ كَامِلَةً يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ وَمِنْ أَوْزَارِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُضِلُّونَهُم بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَزِرُونَ

ayahArabic: قَدْ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَى ٱللَّهُ بُنْيٰنَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَوَاعِدِ فَخَرَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّقْفُ مِن فَوْقِهِمْ وَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those before them had already plotted, but Allāh came at [i.e., uprooted] their building from the foundations, so the roof fell upon them from above them, and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive.

ayahArabic: قَدْ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَى ٱللَّهُ بُنْيٰنَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَوَاعِدِ فَخَرَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّقْفُ مِن فَوْقِهِمْ وَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those before them had already plotted, but Allāh came at [i.e., uprooted] their building from the foundations, so the roof fell upon them from above them, and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive.

ayahArabic: قَدْ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَى ٱللَّهُ بُنْيٰنَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَوَاعِدِ فَخَرَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّقْفُ مِن فَوْقِهِمْ وَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those before them had already plotted, but Allāh came at [i.e., uprooted] their building from the foundations, so the roof fell upon them from above them, and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive.

ayahArabic: قَدْ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَى ٱللَّهُ بُنْيٰنَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَوَاعِدِ فَخَرَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّقْفُ مِن فَوْقِهِمْ وَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ

targetTranslation: on the day (of ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - the Resurrection)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ يُخْزِيهِمْ وَيَقُولُ أَيْنَ شُرَكَآءِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ كُنتُمْ تُشٰٓقُّونَ فِيهِمْ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ إِنَّ ٱلْخِزْىَ ٱلْيَوْمَ وَٱلسُّوٓءَ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then on the Day of Resurrection He will disgrace them and say, "Where are My 'partners' for whom you used to oppose [the believers]?" Those who were given knowledge will say, "Indeed disgrace, this Day, and evil are upon the disbelievers" -

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ يُخْزِيهِمْ وَيَقُولُ أَيْنَ شُرَكَآءِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ كُنتُمْ تُشٰٓقُّونَ فِيهِمْ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ إِنَّ ٱلْخِزْىَ ٱلْيَوْمَ وَٱلسُّوٓءَ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ تَتَوَفَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ ظَالِمِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَأَلْقَوُا۟ ٱلسَّلَمَ مَا كُنَّا نَعْمَلُ مِن سُوٓءٍۭ بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: The ones whom the angels take in death [while] wronging themselves, and [who] then offer submission, [saying], "We were not doing any evil." But, yes! Indeed, Allāh is Knowing of what you used to do.

targetTranslation: she receives/takes them completely (subject: الْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ - the angels)

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ تَتَوَفَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ ظَالِمِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَأَلْقَوُا۟ ٱلسَّلَمَ مَا كُنَّا نَعْمَلُ مِن سُوٓءٍۭ بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: The ones whom the angels take in death [while] wronging themselves, and [who] then offer submission, [saying], "We were not doing any evil." But, yes! Indeed, Allāh is Knowing of what you used to do.

ayahArabic: فَٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَلَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant.

targetTranslation: Hell (the destination being entered through أَبْوٰبَ/gates)
ayahArabic: فَٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَلَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant.

targetTranslation: those remaining forever (describes the people entering hell)
ayahArabic: فَٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَلَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant.

targetTranslation: dwelling place (of ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ - the arrogant ones)
ayahArabic: فَٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَلَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant.

ayahArabic: وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And it will be said to those who feared Allāh, "What did your Lord send down?" They will say, "[That which is] good." For those who do good in this world is good; and the home of the Hereafter is better. And how excellent is the home of the righteous -

targetTranslation: what (asking about أَنزَلَ - what was sent down)
ayahArabic: وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And it will be said to those who feared Allāh, "What did your Lord send down?" They will say, "[That which is] good." For those who do good in this world is good; and the home of the Hereafter is better. And how excellent is the home of the righteous -

ayahArabic: وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ

targetTranslation: your Lord (in response to مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ)

ayahArabic: وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ

ayahArabic: وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And it will be said to those who feared Allāh, "What did your Lord send down?" They will say, "[That which is] good." For those who do good in this world is good; and the home of the Hereafter is better. And how excellent is the home of the righteous -

targetTranslation: gardens (as the main subject that يَدْخُلُونَهَا 'they will enter')
ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ لَهُمْ فِيهَا مَا يَشَآءُونَ كَذٰلِكَ يَجْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, beneath which rivers flow. They will have therein whatever they wish. Thus does Allāh reward the righteous -

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ لَهُمْ فِيهَا مَا يَشَآءُونَ كَذٰلِكَ يَجْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, beneath which rivers flow. They will have therein whatever they wish. Thus does Allāh reward the righteous -

targetTranslation: they enter it (referring to جَنَّاتُ - the gardens)
ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ لَهُمْ فِيهَا مَا يَشَآءُونَ كَذٰلِكَ يَجْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, beneath which rivers flow. They will have therein whatever they wish. Thus does Allāh reward the righteous -

targetTranslation: it (she) flows (referring to rivers flowing under جَنَّاتُ)

targetTranslation: they want/wish (referring to the believers in Paradise)

targetTranslation: he gives what is due (with weak letter ending)

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ تَتَوَفَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ طَيِّبِينَ يَقُولُونَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: The ones whom the angels take in death, [being] good and pure; [the angels] will say, "Peace be upon you. Enter Paradise for what you used to do."

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ تَتَوَفَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ طَيِّبِينَ يَقُولُونَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: The ones whom the angels take in death, [being] good and pure; [the angels] will say, "Peace be upon you. Enter Paradise for what you used to do."

targetTranslation: those who are pure/good (referring to the righteous souls the angels are taking)

targetTranslation: you all were (referring to those who did good deeds)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ تَتَوَفَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ طَيِّبِينَ يَقُولُونَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

ayahEnglish: The ones whom the angels take in death, [being] good and pure; [the angels] will say, "Peace be upon you. Enter Paradise for what you used to do."

ayahArabic: هَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ أَوْ يَأْتِىَ أَمْرُ رَبِّكَ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَمَا ظَلَمَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they [i.e., the disbelievers] await except that the angels should come to them or there comes the command of your Lord? Thus did those do before them. And Allāh wronged them not, but they had been wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: هَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ أَوْ يَأْتِىَ أَمْرُ رَبِّكَ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَمَا ظَلَمَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they [i.e., the disbelievers] await except that the angels should come to them or there comes the command of your Lord? Thus did those do before them. And Allāh wronged them not, but they had been wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: فَأَصَابَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: So they were struck by the evil consequences of what they did and were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا۟ لَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَا عَبَدْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ نَّحْنُ وَلَآ ءَابَآؤُنَا وَلَا حَرَّمْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَهَلْ عَلَى ٱلرُّسُلِ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And those who associate others with Allāh say, "If Allāh had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification?

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا۟ لَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَا عَبَدْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ نَّحْنُ وَلَآ ءَابَآؤُنَا وَلَا حَرَّمْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَهَلْ عَلَى ٱلرُّسُلِ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And those who associate others with Allāh say, "If Allāh had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification?

targetTranslation: we made (something) completely forbidden (referring to what the polytheists falsely claimed about Allah's prohibitions)

ayahEnglish: And those who associate others with Allāh say, "If Allāh had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification?

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا۟ لَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَا عَبَدْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ نَّحْنُ وَلَآ ءَابَآؤُنَا وَلَا حَرَّمْنَا مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَىْءٍ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَهَلْ عَلَى ٱلرُّسُلِ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And those who associate others with Allāh say, "If Allāh had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification?

targetTranslation: we sent forth (connected to رَّسُولًا - a messenger)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ بَعَثْنَا فِى كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ رَّسُولًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱجْتَنِبُوا۟ ٱلطَّاغُوتَ فَمِنْهُم مَّنْ هَدَى ٱللَّهُ وَمِنْهُم مَّنْ حَقَّتْ عَلَيْهِ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ فَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly sent into every nation a messenger, [saying], "Worship Allāh and avoid ṭāghūt." And among them were those whom Allāh guided, and among them were those upon whom error was [deservedly] decreed. So proceed [i.e., travel] through the earth and observe how was the end of the deniers.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ بَعَثْنَا فِى كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ رَّسُولًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱجْتَنِبُوا۟ ٱلطَّاغُوتَ فَمِنْهُم مَّنْ هَدَى ٱللَّهُ وَمِنْهُم مَّنْ حَقَّتْ عَلَيْهِ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ فَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

targetTranslation: you are eager (addressing Prophet Muhammad ﷺ about هُدَىٰهُمْ/their guidance)
ayahArabic: إِن تَحْرِصْ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَن يُضِلُّ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّاصِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muḥammad], indeed, Allāh does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers.

ayahArabic: إِن تَحْرِصْ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَن يُضِلُّ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّاصِرِينَ

ayahArabic: إِن تَحْرِصْ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَن يُضِلُّ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّاصِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muḥammad], indeed, Allāh does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers.

ayahArabic: إِن تَحْرِصْ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَن يُضِلُّ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّاصِرِينَ

ayahEnglish: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muḥammad], indeed, Allāh does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers.

ayahEnglish: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muḥammad], indeed, Allāh does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers.

targetTranslation: utmost effort (object of أَقْسَمُوا - they swore)
ayahArabic: وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ لَا يَبْعَثُ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَمُوتُ بَلَىٰ وَعْدًا عَلَيْهِ حَقًّا وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they swear by Allāh their strongest oaths [that] Allāh will not resurrect one who dies. But yes - [it is] a true promise [binding] upon Him, but most of the people do not know.

ayahArabic: وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ لَا يَبْعَثُ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَمُوتُ بَلَىٰ وَعْدًا عَلَيْهِ حَقًّا وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

targetTranslation: they know (referring to most people in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
ayahArabic: وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ لَا يَبْعَثُ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَمُوتُ بَلَىٰ وَعْدًا عَلَيْهِ حَقًّا وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

targetTranslation: the one who/which (subject of يَخْتَلِفُونَ - they differ)
ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

targetTranslation: they were (referring to those who disbelieved)
ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

ayahArabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ إِذَآ أَرَدْنٰهُ أَن نَّقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ إِذَآ أَرَدْنٰهُ أَن نَّقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ إِذَآ أَرَدْنٰهُ أَن نَّقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.

targetTranslation: we say (after أَن in the ayah)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ إِذَآ أَرَدْنٰهُ أَن نَّقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ إِذَآ أَرَدْنٰهُ أَن نَّقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.

targetTranslation: they emigrated (referring to those who left Mecca for Allah's cause)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَلَأَجْرُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allāh after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَلَأَجْرُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allāh after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَلَأَجْرُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allāh after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know.

targetTranslation: they were wronged (referring to those who migrated)

ayahEnglish: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allāh after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied.

targetTranslation: they put complete trust (in their Lord)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

targetTranslation: what/that which (connects to نُزِّلَ - was sent down)
ayahArabic: بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ وَٱلزُّبُرِ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلذِّكْرَ لِتُبَيِّنَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا نُزِّلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [We sent them] with clear proofs and written ordinances. And We revealed to you the message [i.e., the Qur’ān] that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought.

ayahArabic: بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ وَٱلزُّبُرِ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلذِّكْرَ لِتُبَيِّنَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا نُزِّلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [We sent them] with clear proofs and written ordinances. And We revealed to you the message [i.e., the Qur’ān] that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought.

ayahArabic: بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ وَٱلزُّبُرِ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلذِّكْرَ لِتُبَيِّنَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا نُزِّلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [We sent them] with clear proofs and written ordinances. And We revealed to you the message [i.e., the Qur’ān] that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought.

targetTranslation: Do they then feel safe (from يَخْسِفَ)?
ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

targetTranslation: they plotted (subject of evil deeds in أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

targetTranslation: he comes to them (object of يَخْسِفَ - that he may swallow up)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

targetTranslation: where (from where they do not perceive)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَكَرُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن يَخْسِفَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ يَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allāh will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?

ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ فِى تَقَلُّبِهِمْ فَمَا هُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them during their [usual] activity, and they could not cause failure [i.e., escape from Him]?

targetTranslation: their moving back and forth repeatedly
ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ فِى تَقَلُّبِهِمْ فَمَا هُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them during their [usual] activity, and they could not cause failure [i.e., escape from Him]?

targetTranslation: they/them (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ فِى تَقَلُّبِهِمْ فَمَا هُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them during their [usual] activity, and they could not cause failure [i.e., escape from Him]?

ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ عَلَىٰ تَخَوُّفٍ فَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ عَلَىٰ تَخَوُّفٍ فَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ عَلَىٰ تَخَوُّفٍ فَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

targetTranslation: One who is very kind and caring (describing رَبَّكُمْ - your Lord)
ayahArabic: أَوْ يَأْخُذَهُمْ عَلَىٰ تَخَوُّفٍ فَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: they see (referring to those who don't observe Allah's signs)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: that which (connects to خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ - Allah created)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: they gradually turn (referring to ظِلٰلُهُ - its shadows)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: its shadows (as the doer of يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: prostrating ones (describing their state in the ayah)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ يَتَفَيَّؤُا۟ ظِلٰلُهُۥ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَٱلشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلَّهِ وَهُمْ دٰخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered what things Allāh has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allāh, while they [i.e., those creations] are humble.

targetTranslation: he bows down in worship (subject of what exists in the heavens)
ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ يَسْجُدُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant.

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ يَسْجُدُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant.

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ يَسْجُدُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant.

targetTranslation: they act arrogantly (referring to those who refuse to submit to Allah)
ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ يَسْجُدُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant.

ayahArabic: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.

ayahArabic: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.

ayahArabic: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.

targetTranslation: that which (object of يُؤْمَرُونَ - they are commanded)
ayahArabic: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.

ayahArabic: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.

targetTranslation: Allah (the one true God who says يَقُولُ)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوٓا۟ إِلٰهَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He [i.e., Allāh] is but one God, so fear only Me."

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلدِّينُ وَاصِبًا أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allāh that you fear?

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلدِّينُ وَاصِبًا أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allāh that you fear?

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلدِّينُ وَاصِبًا أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allāh that you fear?

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلدِّينُ وَاصِبًا أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allāh that you fear?

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلدِّينُ وَاصِبًا أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allāh that you fear?

ayahArabic: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allāh. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.

ayahArabic: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allāh. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.

ayahArabic: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allāh. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.

targetTranslation: touched/affected you all strongly (referring to hardship/الضُّرُّ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allāh. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.

targetTranslation: you all cry out desperately (to Allah when harm touches you)
ayahArabic: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allāh. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِذَا كَشَفَ ٱلضُّرَّ عَنكُمْ إِذَا فَرِيقٌ مِّنكُم بِرَبِّهِمْ يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِذَا كَشَفَ ٱلضُّرَّ عَنكُمْ إِذَا فَرِيقٌ مِّنكُم بِرَبِّهِمْ يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِذَا كَشَفَ ٱلضُّرَّ عَنكُمْ إِذَا فَرِيقٌ مِّنكُم بِرَبِّهِمْ يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِذَا كَشَفَ ٱلضُّرَّ عَنكُمْ إِذَا فَرِيقٌ مِّنكُم بِرَبِّهِمْ يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord

ayahArabic: لِيَكْفُرُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ فَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So they will deny what We have given them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.

ayahArabic: لِيَكْفُرُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ فَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So they will deny what We have given them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ نَصِيبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ تَٱللَّهِ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنتُمْ تَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they assign to what they do not know [i.e., false deities] a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allāh, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ نَصِيبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ تَٱللَّهِ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنتُمْ تَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they assign to what they do not know [i.e., false deities] a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allāh, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ نَصِيبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ تَٱللَّهِ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنتُمْ تَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they assign to what they do not know [i.e., false deities] a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allāh, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ نَصِيبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ تَٱللَّهِ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنتُمْ تَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they assign to what they do not know [i.e., false deities] a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allāh, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ نَصِيبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ تَٱللَّهِ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنتُمْ تَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they assign to what they do not know [i.e., false deities] a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allāh, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.

targetTranslation: His absolute perfection/glory (being attributed to Allah in response to false claims)
ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ ٱلْبَنٰتِ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَلَهُم مَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they attribute to Allāh daughters - exalted is He - and for them is what they desire [i.e., sons].

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ ٱلْبَنٰتِ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَلَهُم مَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they attribute to Allāh daughters - exalted is He - and for them is what they desire [i.e., sons].

ayahArabic: وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ ٱلْبَنٰتِ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَلَهُم مَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they attribute to Allāh daughters - exalted is He - and for them is what they desire [i.e., sons].

targetTranslation: was given good news (subject is أَحَدُهُم - one of them)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِٱلْأُنثَىٰ ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

targetTranslation: he hides himself (from مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ - from the people)
ayahArabic: يَتَوٰرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ مِن سُوٓءِ مَا بُشِّرَ بِهِۦٓ أَيُمْسِكُهُۥ عَلَىٰ هُونٍ أَمْ يَدُسُّهُۥ فِى ٱلتُّرَابِ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed. Should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground? Unquestionably, evil is what they decide.

ayahArabic: يَتَوٰرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ مِن سُوٓءِ مَا بُشِّرَ بِهِۦٓ أَيُمْسِكُهُۥ عَلَىٰ هُونٍ أَمْ يَدُسُّهُۥ فِى ٱلتُّرَابِ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ

targetTranslation: how evil/bad it became! (describing their judgment in يَحْكُمُونَ)

ayahArabic: يَتَوٰرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ مِن سُوٓءِ مَا بُشِّرَ بِهِۦٓ أَيُمْسِكُهُۥ عَلَىٰ هُونٍ أَمْ يَدُسُّهُۥ فِى ٱلتُّرَابِ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed. Should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground? Unquestionably, evil is what they decide.

ayahArabic: يَتَوٰرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ مِن سُوٓءِ مَا بُشِّرَ بِهِۦٓ أَيُمْسِكُهُۥ عَلَىٰ هُونٍ أَمْ يَدُسُّهُۥ فِى ٱلتُّرَابِ أَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed. Should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground? Unquestionably, evil is what they decide.

ayahArabic: لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ مَثَلُ ٱلسَّوْءِ وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْمَثَلُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: For those who do not believe in the Hereafter is the description [i.e., an attribute] of evil; and for Allāh is the highest attribute. And He is Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahArabic: لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ مَثَلُ ٱلسَّوْءِ وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْمَثَلُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: For those who do not believe in the Hereafter is the description [i.e., an attribute] of evil; and for Allāh is the highest attribute. And He is Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِظُلْمِهِم مَّا تَرَكَ عَلَيْهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَلٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if Allāh were to impose blame on the people for their wrongdoing, He would not have left upon it [i.e., the earth] any creature, but He defers them for a specified term. And when their term has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِظُلْمِهِم مَّا تَرَكَ عَلَيْهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَلٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if Allāh were to impose blame on the people for their wrongdoing, He would not have left upon it [i.e., the earth] any creature, but He defers them for a specified term. And when their term has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

targetTranslation: he left (referring to Allah in ٱللَّهُ)

targetTranslation: he delays/is delaying them (referring to ٱلنَّاسَ - the people)
